name: SCC external replication on CaRPool-seq (GSE213957) — 2nd combinatorial dataset
status: PRE-REGISTERED BEFORE DOWNLOAD. Freezes the protocol so a NULL is a clean honest negative (like PGW), not a retrofit.
dataset: CaRPool-seq, Wessels et al. Nat Methods 2023 (DOI 10.1038/s41592-022-01705-x), GEO GSE213957, THP-1 AML screen, Cas13 RNA-targeting, 26 regulators + 2 controls, ~158 paired perturbations.
why: Norman SCC result is single-dataset (K562, CRISPRa). CaRPool-seq is a DIFFERENT modality (Cas13 knockdown) and cell type (THP-1). Replication here tests generalization; a null is an honest modality boundary.
protocol_ported_verbatim_from: Norman SCC pipeline (data/gold/scc_powered_prereg.json sha 77bcaea9). Same synergy estimator, same leakage-safe prior (sum of single-effect magnitudes, singles-only), same LOPO.
synergy_definition: synergy_mag = ||observed_double_pseudobulk - (eff(A)+eff(B))|| where eff = mean-log1p-CP10K deviation from control; IDENTICAL estimator to Norman.
leakage_safe_prior: s_hat = sum of the two single-perturbation effect magnitudes; computed only from singles; never touches the double's measured outcome.
primary_endpoint: reduction in the miscoverage-vs-synergy SLOPE, vanilla split-conformal vs SCC, via LOPO per-pair logistic interaction (cov ~ method + synergy + method:synergy); interaction coeff > 0 one-sided.

inference.permutation: shuffle synergy labels, recompute interaction, B>=2000, one-sided p
inference.bootstrap: pair-level cluster bootstrap 95% CI on interaction coeff

frozen_composite_bar_IDENTICAL_to_Norman: CLEARS iff interaction coeff>0 at perm p<0.05 AND CI excludes 0 AND vanilla high-synergy(top-50%) coverage CI excludes 0.90 from below AND SCC high-synergy CI contains 0.90.

outcomes.replicates: headline = 'SCC reduces high-synergy miscoverage across 2 datasets / 2 modalities / 2 cell types (CRISPRa-K562 + Cas13-THP1), pre-registered, perm p per dataset'
outcomes.null: honest modality-boundary finding: 'SCC's synergy prior transfers within CRISPRa but attenuates under Cas13 knockdown' — still a real contribution, consistent with honesty-is-load-bearing

leakage_guards: LOPO removes test pair from its own calibration
citations: Wessels et al. Nat Methods 2023 DOI 10.1038/s41592-022-01705-x
